implementation: Resolved: not_applicable_to_frontend. No API contract exists for PDF generation or final-PDF verification. Deferred to Phase 7 (backend contract). The frontend correctly indicates academic_simulation signing without fabricating PDF capability.

Resolved: superseded_by_accepted_architecture. The accepted architecture uses academic_simulation signing (ADR-013, API-024 academic_simulation mode). No backend contract field exists for physical-signature attachment. Deferred to Phase 7.
